# Prime Layer Coatings LLC

> Licensed & insured professional painting company serving all of Las Vegas, NV. Mobile service — we come to you. Interior and exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, and epoxy floor coatings for residential and commercial properties. Bilingual team (English & Spanish).

Prime Layer Coatings LLC provides premium painting and coating services with free, no-obligation estimates.

## Services
- Interior Painting: walls, ceilings, trim, and doors
- Exterior Painting: weather-resistant coatings, pressure washing, and masking
- Cabinet Refinishing: factory-smooth finishes for kitchens and bathrooms
- Epoxy Floor Coatings: commercial and industrial floors

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.primelayercoating.com/): overview, services, gallery, and free quote form
- [Services](https://www.primelayercoating.com/#services): detailed service descriptions
- [Gallery](https://www.primelayercoating.com/#gallery): project photos and videos
- [Reviews](https://www.primelayercoating.com/#reviews): Google reviews
- [Service Areas](https://www.primelayercoating.com/#areas): all Las Vegas valley neighborhoods
- [FAQ](https://www.primelayercoating.com/#faq): common questions — or chat with Ava AI assistant
- [Contact / Free Quote](https://www.primelayercoating.com/#contact): quote request form and contact details
